hero.headline: Your Remote Property. Fully Connected. Fully Defended.
hero.subheadline: Elite integration of Starlink, Ubiquiti, Home Assistant, Victron & Reolink for premium fincas across Almansa, Ontinyent, Yecla and Villena.
hero.trustLine: Trusted by discerning property owners across inland Spain

servicesSection.heading: Complete Estate Intelligence
servicesSection.subheading: Every system engineered for remote reliability, rural conditions, and zero-compromise performance.

connectivity.title: Flawless Connectivity
connectivity.shortDesc: Starlink structural mounting, 4G/5G multi-WAN redundancy, and property-wide Ubiquiti mesh — including P2P bridges to remote gates and guest houses.
connectivity.hero: Your finca deserves enterprise-grade connectivity, not compromises.

starlink.title: Starlink Structural Mounting
starlink.body: We engineer robust, ground-penetrating or roof-anchored mounts for Starlink dishes — optimised for Spanish wind loads, angle of elevation for southern latitudes, and clean cable routing. No wobbling arms, no signal interruptions during Levante winds.

wan.title: 4G/5G Multi-WAN Redundancy
wan.body: We configure dual-WAN routers with automatic failover: Starlink as primary, 4G/5G LTE as seamless backup. If one link drops, your cameras, automation, and remote access stay live. Zero manual intervention required.

ubiquiti.title: Ubiquiti UniFi Estate Networking
ubiquiti.body: Full UniFi Dream Machine or Cloud Gateway deployments. We place access points for outdoor coverage of pools, garages, and terraces. Point-to-point wireless bridges connect remote gates, guest casas, or machinery sheds — up to 500m without trenching cable.

security.title: Autonomous Security
security.shortDesc: Smart IP surveillance grids, local NVR deployment, edge-AI object and vehicle detection, and encrypted remote cloud streaming access.
security.hero: Know exactly what is on your property — from anywhere in the world.

cameras.title: Smart IP Surveillance Grid
cameras.body: We design and mount Reolink IP camera networks covering all entry points, perimeters, and blind spots. PoE-powered from your UniFi switch — clean, weatherproof installations with zero visible cabling.

nvr.title: Local NVR Deployment
nvr.body: All footage stored locally on a hardened NVR appliance — no mandatory cloud subscription, no data leaving your property without your consent. RAID-configured for redundancy. We size storage for your camera count and retention policy.

detection.title: Edge-AI Object & Vehicle Detection
detection.body: We calibrate smart detection zones per camera: person, vehicle, and animal classification. False alerts from tree movement or insects are eliminated. Push notifications to your phone when a vehicle enters the driveway — not every time a cat walks past.

automation.title: Smart Finca Automation
automation.shortDesc: Centralised Home Assistant configurations for automated driveway gates, local weather stations, and wind/rain-responsive shades or bioclimatic pergolas.
automation.hero: Your finca responds intelligently to conditions — with or without you present.

gates.title: Automated Gate Control
gates.body: We integrate existing or new gate motors into Home Assistant via MQTT or local API. Open your gate from anywhere via your phone, set schedules, or trigger on vehicle detection. Full audit log of every open/close event.

weather.title: Local Weather Station Integration
weather.body: We mount professional-grade local weather stations and feed live wind speed, rain accumulation, UV index, and temperature into Home Assistant dashboards. Your automations respond to real local conditions, not distant met office data.

shades.title: Wind & Rain Responsive Shades
shades.body: Bioclimatic pergola louvres, exterior roller blinds, and awnings are wired to Home Assistant. They retract automatically when wind exceeds safe thresholds or rain begins — protecting your investment without you lifting a finger.

energy.title: Smart Energy & Utilities
energy.shortDesc: Solar structural optimisation, Lithium/Victron upgrades, remote energy monitoring, smart landscape lighting, and automated moisture-sensing water shut-off.
energy.hero: Energy independence — engineered, monitored, and future-proofed.

solar.title: Solar Structural Optimisation
solar.body: We survey your existing panel layouts and mounting structures for angle, shading losses, and structural integrity. We redesign and re-mount for maximum yield across the Spanish solar calendar. Panel wiring and DC-side connections handled by our certified electrical partners.

victron.title: Lithium & Victron Upgrades
victron.body: We upgrade ageing lead-acid battery banks to modern LiFePO4 configurations with Victron MultiPlus or Quattro inverter-chargers. Remote monitoring via VRM Portal gives you live state-of-charge, historical trends, and proactive degradation alerts.

utilities.title: Smart Lighting & Water Shut-Off
utilities.body: Landscape and architectural lighting on smart schedules or presence triggers. Wireless moisture sensors at key supply points integrated with inline motorised shut-off valves — automatic water isolation when a pipe leak is detected, minimising damage while you are away.

fincaCare.heading: Finca Care Subscriptions
fincaCare.subheading: Always-on estate maintenance — remote monitoring or full on-site service.

total.name: Total Peace-of-Mind
features: Camera lens cleaning & solar panel wipe
Full sensor and detection test battery

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes. Both plans are rolling monthly subscriptions with no minimum term. Cancel with 30 days notice.

items.q: What area do you cover for on-site visits?
items.a: We cover Almansa, Ontinyent, Yecla, Villena, and surrounding municipalities within the inland Valencia and Murcia border region.
We engineer, mount, and configure all technical infrastructure. High-voltage certified grid tie-ins are coordinated via our network of licensed local electricians at transparent rates.

items.q: Do I need to be present during visits?
items.a: No. With key-safe or gate code access we can complete monthly audits without you travelling to the property.

compliance.notice: NextGen Finca engineers, mounts, and configures all technical infrastructure. High-voltage certified grid tie-ins are coordinated via our network of licensed local electricians.
